criteria.reason: Worker dispatch hook is placed after completed parsequeue commit and the happy path is covered by unit tests.
Telegram copy contains result status, review counts, billing summary, snippets, and manual next step.
Reservation metadata stores attempted/delivered markers; duplicate attempts skip sending.
The service performs only owner-bot notification and metadata updates; docs and lint guardrails preserve provider-write boundaries.
Missing identity/contact/reservation and processing states return structured skipped results.

commands_run: PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_refresh_telegram_followup.py tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_worker_apify_settlement.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py
